samples:
Decapitated head
Spitting your brains out
A human life is so much waste
Put it in the hands of fate


Life and death are held in the
Deciding of an evil eye
So beware, you have been warned
Death will not be fair


Fate is your deciding part
How long you live, no one knows
A thousand eyes are watching
Your every move from the skies


Life comes crashing down upon your head
Hope turns into fear as you pass away
In the next life when things seem fair
The good they say turn bad very fast

An empty feeling lies within your eyes
As the bodies fall onto the ground
Legs blown off - all that's left is a shell
Of a human being that once held out hope

Life ends in the blink of an eye
In the real world, only dreams survive
So hold on tight to what is true
And open wide the eyes of your mind


Life is the uncertain number of years until death
Which seems so far away but yet so close at hand
In the next life your loved ones may be born
To a father, mother, and a child


Life goes on without you
Others will be born
Robbed of your body
Left unto the lord above

Extending a place beyond the limits of time
Controlling the past, present, and future
Rewriting history as we see fit


Manipulating emotions to our will
Using words for an excuse to attack
To justify a verbal assault
An excuse to cover up their weaknesses


Manipulating words - using them as weapons
An excuse to cover weakness

Thriving on stories of those that went before
Using them to mold the way things should be
Changing the past to justify what they feel

Manipulating emotions to our will
Using words for an excuse to attack
To justify a verbal assault
An excuse to cover up their weaknesses


Manipulating words - using them as weapons
An excuse to cover weakness


Denial of existence - an excuse to escape
From reality - a way to obtain
What is not theirs - a script to attack
That which cannot be forgiven or condoned

Manipulating emotions to our will
Using words for an excuse to attack
To justify a verbal assault
An excuse to cover up their weaknesses

Put yourself in my mind
And feel what I am feeling
As I lay and wait until the end


Days go by with little change
Things are never going to be the same
As I see things turn to gray around me
My life is ending with every breath

Life goes on without you
Empty eyes, empty hands
An empty feeling growing deep inside
Deep inside

The answer no one can have
To grant a wish that comes from the heart
Too cruel to understand
To live is hell, when you have no more time

Days go by with little change
Things are never going to be the same
As I see things turn to gray around me
My life is ending with every breath

Life goes on without you
Empty eyes, empty hands
An empty feeling growing deep inside
Deep inside

The answer no one can have
To grant a wish that comes from the heart
Too cruel to understand
To live is hell, when you have no more time

It was a dark and stormy night
When visions of terror seized control
Things that cannot be seen, things that cannot be felt
Seeping through the walls to chill your very soul


Scream bloody gore
Evil never looked so real
Scream bloody gore
Death is all around you


Corpse goes first, followed close behind
Blood flies through the air with each step they take
Screaming bloody gore


Unholy seizure slicing through their minds
Controlling human beings for their twisted needs


Orders are given from the other side
To destroy, to possess - there's zero tolerance
For the human race


Scream bloody gore
Evil never looked so real
Scream bloody gore
Death is all around you


Corpse goes first, followed close behind
Blood flies through the air with each step they take
Screaming bloody gore


Unholy seizure slicing through their minds
Controlling human beings for their twisted needs


Orders are given from the other side
To destroy, to possess - there's zero tolerance
For the human race

Decapitated head
Spies to spread the pain
Unholy seizure slicing through the air
Leaving one to die
Shallow flesh, shallow breath
Spirit crusher


Legs blown off, no more pain
A portion of your body left to rot and decay
Scream bloody gore
For those that cannot hear
I will scream for you
In this life so clear


In death so unclear
I will hold on to what I fear

Never to return
Stay with us until the end
Legs blown off, no more pain
A portion of your body left to rot and decay
Scream bloody gore
For those that cannot hear


I will scream for you
In this life so clear


In death so unclear
I will hold on to what I fear

Never to return
Stay with us until the end
Legs blown off, no more pain
A portion of your body left to rot and decay
Scream bloody gore
For those that cannot hear


I will scream for you
In this life so clear

Crossing the line from sight
Emerging into the light
Filled with awe and wonder
At what is to be

Looking down at ourselves
Seeing the image of the one above
Observing our weaknesses
Which help form the flesh


Taking pictures of each other
An excuse to be consumed by jealousy
Controlling the images that will
Be passed down through memory


In the image of the one above
Things are not always how they seem
Things were never meant to be this way
Things will never be the same


Taking pictures of each other
An excuse to be consumed by jealousy
Controlling the images that will
Be passed down through memory

Appalled at what you see
A worldwide source of misery
Where mental images feed physical pain
The creator had no mercy, what a faggot

Lack of comprehension
Of your picture-perfect life
Lack of comprehension
When it comes to knowing the price


What comes around goes around
Fake your way out of it
It's going to be like this
When you exist

Symbolic acts, a script for life
Living by imagination and lies
Sacrificial flesh and blood
A script for living is what it does


Symbolic acts, a script for life
Living by imagination and lies
Sacrificial flesh and blood
A script for living is what it does

Suicidal rancorizing killer
Extending agony until death
Taking life with pleasure
Obbligato for the one whose part is done


Controlling destiny until the end
Prolonging suffering until death
Extending agony until the end
Prolonging suffering until death


Suicide machine
Suicide machine

Suicide machine

Suicide machine

Suicide machine

People from the future
Approach the graves and cry
What have you done to your lives
With your choice of a human design?


Born, bred and trained to kill
Extending agony till death
Controlling your existence
Deciding how long you will last


Live as we choose - take that away
Die as we choose - let justice be done
End it now - why don't you look
To the future for help and advice


Robbed of natural abilities
Left with nothing but pain and misery
Life ends in 2005
The year that destiny took its course


Fate can never be explained
But stories are what they create
Use your time wisely in the future
You may not like what you see

Born, bred and trained to kill
Extending agony till death
Controlling your existence
Deciding how long you will last


Live as we choose - take that away
Die as we choose - let justice be done
End it now - why don't you look
To the future for help and advice

Crossing the line into their world
Emerging to find a place to fit in
An alien out on their search
A scavenger of human flesh


Living amongst them is a script for their revenge
Using humans as a shield to cover up their tracks
The end is near, and some will not survive
Left to die and decay is what they deserve


Some will return with part of their prize
Extending agony with every breath they take
Others will go straight to hell
Leaving behind an empty shell
Some will come away with all their limbs intact
And memories to last
A worldwide killing spree is now complete
Survivors of the first wave of bloodshed
Witnessing human life decay around them
What was once had been destroyed
To exist like this is what they deserve


Living amongst them is a script for their revenge
Using humans as a shield to cover up their tracks
The end is near, and some will not survive
Left to die and decay is what they deserve


Some will return with part of their prize
Extending agony with every breath they take
Others will go straight to hell
Leaving behind an empty shell
Some will come away with all their limbs intact
And memories to last

It is a script
To cover up the scriptwriter's shortfalls
As an excuse to justify the script
The script that creates verbal thralls


An attempt to cover up for weaknesses
That are revealed by those who know better
Those who really understand
Those with keen eyesight and mental prowess


Lack of comprehension of a story's message
Too busy trying to find faults
When it comes to writing fiction
I suppose you think you're above the rest


Behind a writer's choice of words
Lies a thousand cliche-ridden thoughts
A script filled with grammatical errors
Filled with ideas that are as hollow as the author


Flat characters, predictable plots
Filled with cliche-ridden thoughts
An excuse to hide behind the pen name
Of a writer whose work creates verbal thrall


An attempt to cover up weakness
Through cliche-laden verbal diarrhea
Through scripts, they create a shelter
For ideas no one wants to hear
Yet, I find myself trapped inside
Of a twisted mind with twisted motives
Which seem so vivid on the page
Yet turn out to be a waste of breath
